Radio Capital is a radio station in Central City that is syndicated across the country. Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood. Quote: "Hey, the radio! Turn on the radio! Tune to Radio Capital!" It presumably plays mostly political material, and has been described as "boring."

During the chaos of the Central battle, the Mustang Unit took Mrs. Bradley to do an interview at Radio Capital while in their protective custody. During the interview, she talked of the attack that the Central City soldiers had performed, and their willingness to shoot her along with the AWOL soldiers. When they are told to stop the broadcast, the station lies in saying that they are being held at gunpoint by Mustang's men.

During the siege of Central City, Radio Capital's employees are gleefully defiant of Central's government, fully cooperating with the Mustang Unit in exchange for broadcasting Mrs. Bradley's interview.
